title: One Battle After Another: Cast, Plot & Oscar Prospects
text: The film follows ex-revolutionaries who reunite when an enemy resurfaces after 16 years to rescue a comrade's daughter. Inspired by Thomas Pynchon's 1990 novel Vineland, the nearly three-hour thriller explores counterculture themes and personal redemption. Cast includes Leonardo DiCaprio as Bob Ferguson, a former radical turned recluse; Sean Penn as Colonel Steve Lockjaw, the revenge-driven antagonist; Teyana Taylor as Perfidia Beverly Hills, a revolutionary and Bob's girlfriend; Chase Infiniti as Willa, Bob's abducted daughter; and Benicio del Toro as Willa's sensei. The film is competitive across major categories including Best Picture, Best Director, Lead Actor (DiCaprio), and Supporting roles. Critics have been enthusiastic—it holds a 98% Rotten Tomatoes score and 95 on Metacritic. Director Paul Thomas Anderson is an 11-time nominee with no wins; DiCaprio is a seven-time nominee who won for The Revenant (2016). The film's technical craftsmanship positions it strongly for below-the-line categories as well.
